title: psidium scopulorum
intro: Psidium scopulorum, also known as the Guava Bush or Scopulorum Guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psidium scopulorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a variety of medicinal remedies, including treatments for digestive issues and respiratory problems.
